overall.description: First-person exploration of the Slytherin common room and adjacent corridors from Hogwarts Legacy. The player walks through a gothic stone dormitory with green-draped four-poster beds, exits into a corridor with ornate railings and a green stained-glass ceiling, and encounters other students in the shared living space.

agents.ego_description: walking around the empty dormitory, observing the green-draped beds and stone architecture

entered.detail: dark wood four-poster bed with emerald green curtains and white bedding
gothic stone vaulted ceiling with pointed arches
dark wooden dresser with drawers beside the bed
circular patterned rug on the stone floor
pile of wooden trunks and chests stacked near the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the empty Slytherin dormitory, showing multiple four-poster beds with green curtains arranged beneath gothic stone vaulted ceilings. The room features wooden furniture, stacked chests, and warm lighting from wall sconces.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic corridor with stained glass ceiling

events.description: exits the dormitory through an ornate wooden door into the stone corridor
passing under sections of green-tinted stained glass ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the corridor, passing wall sconces and wooden doors

entered.detail: intricate wrought iron railing with organic curved patterns along the walkway
arched ceiling with green-tinted glass panels emitting ethereal light
rough-hewn stone block walls with gothic architectural details

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the dormitory into a long stone corridor featuring ornate metal railings and a distinctive green stained-glass ceiling. The passage is lit by a combination of wall sconces and filtered light from above, with ivy creeping along the stone walls.

events.description: re-enters the common room through a different door, revealing the populated space
other students become visible, sitting and relaxing near their beds

agents.ego_description: moving through the common room, observing other students sitting by the fireplaces and beds

notable_agents.action: student in red robes sitting on a wooden chair beside a four-poster bed
student sitting on the edge of a bed near the back wall

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire providing warm light
wooden writing desk with chair beside one of the beds

segments.scene_description: Re-entering the common room, the space is now populated with students relaxing by the green-draped beds. The camera moves past a lit stone fireplace and wooden desks, capturing the lived-in atmosphere of the dormitory with fellow students visible in the background.

events.description: exits the common room back into the corridor
passing a student walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the corridor toward a wooden door, passing a student in the hallway

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes and hat walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large arched wooden door with metal studs marking the corridor entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera exits back into the stone corridor, walking past ornate railings beneath the green glass ceiling. A student in dark robes walks by in the opposite direction as the camera approaches a large arched wooden door at the end of the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate seclusion of a gothic dormitory into the expansive, ornate architecture of a stone corridor. It begins by gliding through the empty Slytherin dormitory, passing beneath vaulted stone ceilings and beside four-poster beds draped in green curtains. As the camera moves past wooden furniture and stacked chests illuminated by warm wall sconces, it transitions through a doorway and exits the room. The scene then opens into a long stone passage where the warm interior light shifts to a filtered glow emanating from a distinctive green stained-glass ceiling. Finally, the view expands along the corridor, tracing ornate metal railings and ivy creeping across the stone walls.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, lived-in atmosphere of a student dormitory into the grand, echoing scale of a gothic corridor. It begins by gliding through the common room, passing a lit stone fireplace and wooden desks where students relax beside green-draped beds. As the camera moves forward, the cozy interior gives way to a stone passage characterized by ornate railings and a sweeping green stained-glass ceiling. The scene then shifts as a student in dark robes crosses the path, leading the camera further down the hall before finally approaching a large arched wooden door at the end of the passage.
